name: toolchange_near_z_max
description: Tool change near max Z (Z=298). Lift would push past z_lift_safe_max (300), so TOOLCHANGE skips it AND records lifted=0 so PRZ_SPITTING_END knows not to lower later. Retract + queue still happen.

synthetic_sequence.raw: ; baseline at Z=298: TOOLCHANGE skips Z lift (would push to Z=301, exceeds z_lift_max). Retract OLD, queue pending state with lifted=0.
